accountId.description: The account ID of the user, which uniquely identifies the user across all Atlassian products. For example, *5b10ac8d82e05b22cc7d4ef5*.

displayName.description: The display name of the user. Depending on the user’s privacy setting, this may return an alternative value.

key.description:
This property is deprecated in favor of `accountId` because of privacy changes. See the [migration guide](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/deprecation-notice-user-privacy-api-migration-guide/) for details.  
The key of the user.

name.description:
This property is deprecated in favor of `accountId` because of privacy changes. See the [migration guide](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/jira/platform/deprecation-notice-user-privacy-api-migration-guide/) for details.  
The username of the user.
